member.name: M:Foliage.IFoliagePigment.OnLoad
member.summary: Called when the pigment is loaded. Used for setting up the pigment if needed.

member.name: M:Foliage.IFoliagePigment.Radius
member.summary: The radius of the piece of foliage that this pigment paints.

member.name: M:Foliage.IFoliagePigment.Paint(Sandbox.Scene)
member.summary: Called when the pigment is painted, should return a new foliage object that was painted.

member.name: T:Foliage.ModelFoliagePigment
member.summary: A pigment that is just a model. It will create a new game object with a model renderer component.

member.name: T:Foliage.PrefabFoliagePigment
member.summary: A pigment that is a prefab. It will create a clone of the prefab.
